title: Crispy Chicken Salad
description: A crunchy and refreshing salad made with crispy fried chicken, mixed greens, and a sweet and tangy dressing.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together crushed casabe and a pinch of salt.
Dip each chicken piece in the casabe mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the coated chicken to the skillet and fry until golden brown and crispy, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and let it rest on a paper towel-lined plate.
In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens and a drizzle of honey.
Cut the crispy chicken into bite-sized pieces and add it to the bowl with the greens.
Drizzle the french vinaigrette over the salad and toss to combine.
